advice_notification: User is breaking eye contact, showing evasion or distraction, so note to him to look directly at the camera to establish dominance and stop signaling that he is rattled.
User is slouching, showing low energy and defensiveness, so note to him to sit up straight and expand his torso to convey authority instead of physically shrinking from the attack.
User is crossing his arms, showing resistance to incoming information, so note to him to uncross his arms to remove the physical barrier and appear more open to the argument.
User is rapidly turning his head, showing distraction or unease, so note to him to keep his head steady to demonstrate active listening and hold his ground.
User is frequently touching his face or neck, showing high cognitive load or anxiety, so note to him to keep his hands down to avoid broadcasting a 'tell' of stress.
User is continuously swaying, showing leaking nervous energy, so note to him to plant his feet firmly so he doesn't look like he is trying to escape the room.
User is displaying a pronounced shoulder tilt, showing subconscious withdrawal, so note to him to square his shoulders to confront the argument head-on instead of physically retreating.
